server/src/image_tool/batch_routes.py :: submit_batch
async def submit_batch(
    format: str = Form(""),
    preset: str = Form(""),
    max_mb: float = Form(1),
    resize_w: str = Form(""),
    resize_h: str = Form(""),
    filter: str = Form("none"),
    strip_metadata: str = Form("true"),
    apply_orientation: str = Form("true"),
    images: list[UploadFile] = File(...),
) -> JSONResponse:
    if not images:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="At least one image is required.")
    if not preset and not format:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="Provide format or preset.")

    files: list[tuple[str, bytes]] = []
    for upload in images:
        payload = await upload.read()
        files.append((upload.filename or "upload", payload))

    try:
        edits = EditOptions.from_form(
            resize_w=resize_w,
            resize_h=resize_h,
            filter=filter,
            post_filter="none",
        )
        output_format = format or get_preset(preset).format
        job = batch_queue.create_job(
            output_format,
            files,
            max_mb=max_mb,
            edits=edits,
            strip_metadata=_form_bool(strip_metadata),
            apply_orientation=_form_b
